title: salvia officinalis var. trichostachya
intro: Salvia officinalis var. trichostachya, also known as the red sage or purple sage, is a variant of the common sage plant, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and sturdy stems. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as camphor, bornel, and thujone, that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Salvia officinalis var. trichostachya include improving cognitive function, reducing inflammation, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
